name: Crockpot Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 Round steak, cut into serving size
recipeInstructions:
1. Flour the meat.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients (except onion) in a bowl.
3. Place the meat in the crockpot.
4. Top with sliced onions.
5. Pour on the tomato sauce.
6. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours.
